01whoami
A quick scan of who's behind the keyboard.
// YOGESHWARAN.exe

I'm Yogeshwaran, a college student majoring in Computer Science with a deep interest in cyber security — breaking things to understand how to defend them better.

I spend my time on vulnerability research, capture-the-flag challenges, and building small security tools. I'm comfortable across the stack of an attack: reconnaissance, exploitation, and writing the report afterward that actually gets the bug fixed.

Currently sharpening skills in penetration testing, network defense, and secure coding — aiming to turn curiosity about "how systems break" into a career protecting them.
